BWS IPFS
BWS.IPFS.Upload enables easy uploading of images and JSON files to the IPFS network, simplifying web3 content distribution.
NFT.zK
Easily bring your NFTs to life with our Zero Knowledge API.
Fan Game Cube
Get a new revenue stream for your Sports Club by combining NFTs and Machine Learning.
Blockchain Badges
Blockchain Badges offer trust, secure and verifiable digital credentials using the blockchain.
ESG Credits
Deliver environmental impact reports using the ICMA standard or any chosen taxonomy.
Telegram XBot
A Telegram bot to track X activity and highlighting top contributors.

Get started
Sep 16, 2023

Embrace Sustainability with ESG.Credits BWS Solution

Take your financial institution's sustainability initiatives to the next level with ESG.Credits, a revolutionary API solution designed to integrate Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) impact benefits into your digital platforms.

Introducing ESG.Credits, the cutting-edge API solution that empowers forward-thinking institutions to integrate Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) impact benefits into their digital platforms with ease!

What is ESG.Credits?

ESG.Credits is a revolutionary API solution by Blockchain Web Services (BWS) designed to unlock the true potential of sustainable finance. It offers unparalleled flexibility in impact reporting, adhering to recognised frameworks such as the International Capital Market Association (ICMA) standard or any chosen taxonomy. The API accommodates two tiers of impact categories and indicators, supporting any impacted unit and ensuring that your impact reporting can be as granular and specific as required.

How Does It Work?

With ESG.Credits, you can effortlessly calculate impact values on an annual basis or based on the term of your financial instruments. The API's calculations rely on your green framework or the "impact profile" of your green project portfolio, reinforcing the authenticity and transparency of your reporting.

Aligning with Global Sustainability Goals

ESG.Credits allows you to align your initiatives with the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) classifications, and also the EU Taxonomy Regulation’s Environmental Objectives. By associating these goals and objectives with your chosen taxonomy impact categories, you can showcase your institution's commitment to building a better world.

Supporting Global Financial Institutions

The API supports any combination of currencies and languages, catering to the diverse needs of financial institutions worldwide. Whether you operate in euros, dollars, English, French or any other currency or language, ESG.Credits has got you covered!

Building Trust with Blockchain Technology

At BWS, trust and data integrity are paramount. ESG.Credits stores your framework's ESG impact profile on the blockchain, guaranteeing tamper-proof records and helping build trust with your stakeholders. Learn more.

The Future of Sustainable Finance

With ESG.Credits, your financial institution gains a comprehensive, customisable, and efficient way to enhance ESG reporting. By embracing this groundbreaking API solution, you position yourself ahead in the increasingly important realm of sustainable finance.

Join us in the journey towards a greener and more sustainable future. Experience the power of ESG.Credits API and contribute to a better world for generations to come.

Learn more, and join the sustainability revolution!

We believe blockchain will transform everything, empowering communities to move forward together. Blockchain Web Services provides the solutions and tools to make this journey faster and more accessible.
